name: Peanut Butter Oat Cookies
description: Soft-baked cookies with natural peanut butter and rolled oats.
fullDescription: Our Peanut Butter Oat Cookies are baked fresh daily using stone-ground natural peanut butter, certified organic rolled oats, raw cane sugar, and free-range eggs. No hydrogenated oils, no corn syrup — just honest, wholesome ingredients. Crisp on the outside, chewy at the center, with a deep roasted peanut aroma in every bite.

name: Matcha Latte Cold Brew
description: Ceremonial grade matcha blended with oat milk and lightly sweetened.
fullDescription: Our Matcha Cold Brew starts with ceremonial-grade Japanese matcha — stone-ground from shade-grown tencha leaves in Uji, Kyoto. Whisked into cold-pressed oat milk and lightly sweetened with organic coconut sugar. Creamy, earthy, and subtly sweet with a slow-release caffeine lift that won't spike your energy and crash. Vegan and gluten-free.

name: Organic Medjool Dates
description: Large, soft Medjool dates with a rich caramel-like sweetness.
fullDescription: Harvested from ancient date palms in the Jordan Valley, our Organic Medjool Dates are the finest of their kind — extra-large, intensely sweet, with a soft, almost toffee-like texture. Rich in natural sugars, potassium, and dietary fiber. Use as a natural sweetener in baking, blend into smoothies, or enjoy stuffed with almond butter.

name: Buckwheat Pancake Mix
description: Gluten-free buckwheat pancake mix for fluffy, nutty morning pancakes.
fullDescription: Our Buckwheat Pancake Mix is crafted from stone-milled whole-grain buckwheat flour — naturally gluten-free and rich in rutin, magnesium, and complete protein. Just add your milk of choice and an egg. The batter produces thick, fluffy pancakes with a subtle nutty depth and earthy complexity. Top with maple syrup and fresh berries for the perfect wholesome morning.

name: Cold-Pressed Pineapple Turmeric Juice
description: Bright and tropical juice with pineapple, turmeric, and black pepper.
fullDescription: A sunshine-yellow elixir of cold-pressed organic pineapple, raw turmeric root, and a micro-dose of black pepper to activate curcumin absorption. Anti-inflammatory, digestive-supporting, and vibrantly sweet with a warm spiced finish. A daily shot of this is one of the most powerful wellness habits you can build. No sugar added.

name: Pecan Halves Raw
description: Large, buttery raw pecan halves from organic orchards in Georgia.
fullDescription: Our Raw Pecan Halves are sourced from family-run certified organic orchards in Georgia, USA. Naturally rich in oleic acid, zinc, and antioxidants like ellagic acid. Unroasted and unsalted to preserve their delicate, buttery sweetness. Perfect for pies, salads, oatmeal toppings, or simply snacking. Store in the freezer for up to 12 months.

name: Fresh Organic Raspberries
description: Tender, jewel-red organic raspberries with a bright, tangy flavor.
fullDescription: Our Organic Raspberries are harvested at dawn from certified pesticide-free farms and delivered the same day. Intensely aromatic, delicately sweet, and beautifully tart — every berry is a burst of summer. Packed with Vitamin C, ellagic acid, and ketones. Wonderful with yogurt, in pavlova, or eaten straight from the punnet.

name: Cinnamon Raisin Bagel
description: Hand-rolled bagels with warming cinnamon and plump organic raisins.
fullDescription: Our Cinnamon Raisin Bagels are boiled in honey water before baking — the traditional method that creates their signature chewy crust and pillowy interior. Folded with Ceylon cinnamon and fat organic raisins throughout the dough. Made with unbleached flour and zero preservatives. Toast and spread with cream cheese or almond butter for a timeless breakfast.

name: Coconut Water with Passion Fruit
description: Pure young coconut water blended with fresh passion fruit pulp.
fullDescription: Straight from young Thai green coconuts, our Coconut Water is blended with tangy, seed-speckled passion fruit pulp for a tropical hydration experience. Naturally isotonic with electrolytes — potassium, magnesium, and sodium — making it perfect for post-workout recovery. Lightly tart, subtly sweet, and completely additive-free.

name: Dried Apricots Turkish Style
description: Plump, unsulfured dried apricots with a deep amber sweetness.
fullDescription: Slowly sun-dried in the valleys of Malatya, Turkey — the world capital of apricot cultivation — our Dried Apricots are naturally dark amber in color, intensely sweet, and rich in beta-carotene and iron. Unlike bright orange varieties, ours contain zero sulfur dioxide. Eat as a snack, chop into couscous, or simmer into tagines and compotes.

name: Chia Pudding — Vanilla & Mango
description: Overnight chia pudding with vanilla coconut milk and fresh mango coulis.
fullDescription: Our Vanilla Mango Chia Pudding is prepared overnight using organic white chia seeds soaked in vanilla-infused coconut milk. Topped with a vibrant fresh mango coulis and a sprinkle of toasted coconut flakes. Rich in omega-3 fatty acids, calcium, and prebiotic fiber. A complete breakfast or light dessert that takes zero effort and delivers maximum nutrition.

name: Cold-Pressed Watermelon Mint Juice
description: Light and hydrating cold-pressed watermelon juice with fresh mint.
fullDescription: Pressed from entire organic seedless watermelons and finished with a generous handful of fresh garden mint, this juice is the definition of refreshment. Naturally rich in lycopene, citrulline for muscle recovery, and Vitamin A. No sugar, no water added — just pure, cold-pressed melon at its most vibrant. Serve ice-cold on a hot afternoon.

name: Brazil Nuts Whole
description: Large, creamy Brazil nuts — one of nature's richest sources of selenium.
fullDescription: Harvested wild from the Amazon rainforest floor, our Brazil Nuts are large, creamy, and intensely nutritious. Just two nuts provide over 100% of your daily selenium requirement — an essential mineral for thyroid function, immunity, and antioxidant defense. Completely unprocessed, raw, and stored in nitrogen-sealed packaging to preserve freshness.

name: Blueberry & Oat Muffins
description: Moist oat muffins bursting with organic blueberries and lemon zest.
fullDescription: Our Blueberry Oat Muffins are baked fresh each morning with whole-grain oat flour, organic wild blueberries, and a bright finish of fresh lemon zest. Refined sugar-free — sweetened only with ripe banana and raw honey. Moist, tender, and packed with fiber. A guilt-free bake that genuinely satisfies. Perfect for lunchboxes or mid-morning snacking.

name: Fresh Organic Pomegranate
description: Hand-selected organic pomegranates with ruby-red jewel-like arils.
fullDescription: Our Organic Pomegranates are sourced from sun-drenched farms in Iran and Spain, where the arid climate produces fruit with the highest sugar-to-acid ratio. Each pomegranate is bursting with thousands of ruby arils packed with punicalagins — antioxidants three times more potent than red wine. Eat fresh, juice them, or scatter over salads and grain bowls.

name: Rosemary Focaccia Bread
description: Pillowy Italian focaccia drizzled with olive oil and fresh rosemary.
fullDescription: Our Rosemary Focaccia is slow-proofed for 24 hours to develop an open, airy crumb structure with a deeply golden, olive oil-crisped crust. Topped generously with fresh rosemary sprigs and flaky sea salt. Baked in cast iron for an even heat. Made with organic semolina flour and first-cold-press extra virgin olive oil. Tear and share, or serve alongside soups.

name: Kombucha — Ginger & Lemon
description: Raw fermented kombucha with organic ginger root and fresh lemon.
fullDescription: Our Ginger Lemon Kombucha is brewed for 21 days using a live SCOBY culture fed with organic green tea and raw cane sugar. The long fermentation produces a beautifully tart, effervescent base with naturally occurring probiotics, B vitamins, and organic acids. Finished with cold-pressed ginger and lemon. Lightly fizzy, gut-healing, and completely unpasteurized.

name: Dried Mulberries White
description: Delicate sun-dried white mulberries with a honeyed, fig-like sweetness.
fullDescription: Sun-dried white mulberries from organic farms in Turkey and Uzbekistan — one of the most underappreciated superfoods. Naturally sweet with notes of honey and vanilla. Uniquely high in resveratrol, iron, and 1-deoxynojirimycin (DNJ) — a compound studied for blood sugar management. Eat by the handful, mix into yogurt, or add to baked goods.

name: Pine Nuts Italian Style
description: Buttery European pine nuts, hand-harvested from stone pine cones.
fullDescription: Our Italian Pine Nuts are laboriously harvested from wild Pinus pinea cones in the Mediterranean forests of Portugal and Italy. Far superior in flavor to Asian varieties — longer, creamier, and more intensely buttery. Essential for authentic pesto, incredible toasted over pasta or salads, or blended into hummus for depth. Store refrigerated after opening.

name: Açaí & Pitaya Smoothie
description: A vibrant blend of Amazonian açaí and dragon fruit with coconut milk.
fullDescription: A breathtaking magenta blend of frozen organic açaí from the Amazon and pink dragon fruit (pitaya) from Vietnam, blended smooth with young coconut milk. An antioxidant powerhouse with a gorgeous natural color and a mildly sweet, tropical flavor profile. Vegan, dairy-free, and loaded with betalains, anthocyanins, and healthy fats. Pure liquid vitality.

name: Lemon Poppy Seed Loaf
description: Tender lemon loaf studded with poppy seeds and finished with lemon glaze.
fullDescription: Our Lemon Poppy Seed Loaf is baked from a recipe that balances bright citrus punch with rich, buttery tenderness. Made with organic lemon zest and freshly squeezed juice, stone-ground flour, free-range eggs, and generous poppy seeds throughout. Finished with a translucent lemon-icing glaze. Serve in thick slices with afternoon tea or pack as a lunchbox treat.

name: Cold-Pressed Carrot Ginger Juice
description: Vibrant cold-pressed juice with organic carrots, ginger, and turmeric.
fullDescription: A bold, warming juice pressed from pounds of organic Nantes carrots, raw ginger root, and golden turmeric. Beta-carotene-rich and anti-inflammatory, this juice supports skin radiance, immune resilience, and digestive health. The ginger provides a long, spicy finish that lingers pleasantly. A staple in any serious wellness routine.

name: Organic Kiwi Fruit
description: Tangy and vitamin-rich organic green kiwis, perfectly ripened.
fullDescription: Our Organic Kiwis are grown in the fertile volcanic soils of New Zealand and Italy. Each fruit is harvested at full Brix maturity for the perfect sugar-acid balance — vibrant green flesh, edible skin packed with fiber, and a floral tartness unlike anything else. One kiwi delivers more Vitamin C than an orange. Eat whole, slice into smoothie bowls, or toss into fruit salads.

name: Yogurt & Berry Parfait
description: Layered Greek yogurt parfait with wild berries, granola, and honey.
fullDescription: Our Yogurt Berry Parfait is assembled fresh each morning using thick, strained Greek yogurt from grass-fed cows, layered with wild blueberries and strawberries, and topped with our house-made honey oat granola. A drizzle of raw wildflower honey finishes each jar. High in protein, probiotics, and natural energy — the ideal breakfast-on-the-go in a glass jar.

name: Dried Goji Berries
description: Vibrant red dried goji berries — a legendary superfood from the Himalayas.
fullDescription: Harvested from certified organic wolfberry bushes in the Ningxia region of China — the historical heartland of goji cultivation. Our Dried Goji Berries are sun-dried at low altitude to preserve zeaxanthin, polysaccharides, and all 18 amino acids. Slightly tart and chewy with a faint floral sweetness. Add to trail mix, porridge, or brew as a tea.

name: Turmeric Golden Latte
description: Warming golden milk with turmeric, cinnamon, black pepper, and oat milk.
fullDescription: Our Turmeric Golden Latte is an ancient Ayurvedic recipe brought to life in a bottle. Organic turmeric powder and whole-root extract, Ceylon cinnamon, a precise pinch of black pepper to enhance curcumin bioavailability, and cold-pressed oat milk. Anti-inflammatory, warming, and subtly spiced. Enjoy hot or cold — a ritual for morning and evening alike.

name: Spelt & Walnut Loaf
description: Dense, nutty spelt loaf studded with toasted walnuts and flaxseeds.
fullDescription: Our Spelt Walnut Loaf uses ancient-grain whole spelt flour — lower in gluten, higher in protein and minerals than modern wheat. Naturally leavened with our sourdough starter and generously loaded with toasted California walnuts and golden flaxseeds. Dense, complex, and immensely satisfying. Slice thin and top with ricotta and honey, or enjoy with aged cheddar.

name: Fresh Organic Figs
description: Lush, honey-sweet organic black mission figs, in season and tree-ripened.
fullDescription: Our Black Mission Figs are tree-ripened on certified organic farms in California and Turkey, harvested only when the skin begins to crack and the natural sugars concentrate at their peak. Each fig is soft, jammy, and overflowing with floral sweetness. Rich in calcium, magnesium, and prebiotic fiber. Eat fresh, pair with prosciutto and cheese, or halve and roast with honey.

name: Pistachio Nuts Roasted & Salted
description: Crunchy roasted pistachios in shell, lightly salted with sea salt.
fullDescription: From the sun-scorched pistachio orchards of Kerman, Iran — where the finest pistachios in the world have been cultivated for over 3,000 years. Our Roasted Salted Pistachios are dry-roasted at precise temperatures to achieve the ideal crack-and-peel shell experience, then lightly seasoned with sea salt. Rich in lutein, protein, and fiber. Snack mindfully.

name: Cold-Pressed Celery & Cucumber Juice
description: Clean and alkalizing cold-pressed juice with celery, cucumber, and lime.
fullDescription: Pressed from organic celery stalks, English cucumbers, and a squeeze of fresh lime, this is the quintessential alkalizing green juice. Celery is rich in phthalides for blood pressure support; cucumber provides silica for skin and joint health. Zero sugar, zero additives — just pure, hydrating green goodness. Best consumed first thing in the morning on an empty stomach.
